description: Evaluates policy management maturity—reference subject/object access framework, rule lifecycle, software-defined and context-based policies (network, authentication, authorization, application, data), teams, KPIs/KRIs, and SOC monitoring of policy changes.

capabilities.name: Service Exists and in good condition
capabilities.description: A policy management service exists and is reviewed frequently for efficacy.

capabilities.name: Reference Policy Framework (Subject/Object Access Matrix)
capabilities.description: A reference policy framework provides enterprise-wide visibility of who can access what and guides granular policies.

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Policy management KPIs and KRIs are documented, effective enterprise-wide, and reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Rule Management System
capabilities.description: Centralized rule management supports automation, integration with decision-makers, and frequent review.

capabilities.name: Rule provisioning process (creation / modification) as part of optimization
capabilities.description: Rule creation is documented, enterprise-wide, automated where possible, and reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Rule De-provisioning process (deletion) as part of optimization
capabilities.description: Rule deletion is documented, enterprise-wide, automated where possible, and reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Policy management responsibility and efficacy
capabilities.description: Policy management teams are centralized or clearly defined with documented hierarchy and separation of duties.
evaluation_focus: Formalized team composition and separation of duties

capabilities.name: Software defined Policy
capabilities.description: Software-defined policy is maintained, deployed programmatically, automated, and validated frequently.

capabilities.name: Context Based Policies
capabilities.description: Network devices deploy context-based rather than IP-only policies enterprise-wide with frequent review.

capabilities.name: Authentication Policies
capabilities.description: Edge and access devices use context-based authentication policies enterprise-wide with frequent review.

capabilities.name: Authorization Policies (includes guest authorization policies)
capabilities.description: Authorization policies use context, attributes, and environment with uniform enterprise-wide deployment.

capabilities.name: Network access and control policies (includes Guest NAC policies)
capabilities.description: Network security devices apply consistent logical access control with enterprise-wide deployment.

capabilities.name: Application Access Policies
capabilities.description: Applications use context-based access policies beyond network controls, deployed enterprise-wide.

capabilities.name: Data access policies
capabilities.description: Data access is controlled by classification and context with uniform enterprise-wide policies.

capabilities.name: Policy change monitoring
capabilities.description: Rule and policy changes are formally logged and securely transferred to the SOC, including dynamic changes.

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
